CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-01-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Gregory Goldman, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff. Notice having been given and there being no other appearance nor an objection by appearing counsel. The Court orders case dismissed with prejudice pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)
